text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation standing before the glass doors, peering into this clean, modern space. It beckons like a threshold to new ideas. As I step inside and encounter the vivid R+D display, I am struck by the spirit of inquiry and innovation that fills the room. Surrounded by designs and words dedicated to research and development, I reflect on humanity’s relentless pursuit of understanding. There is a quiet reverence here for the power of asking questions and forging connections. I feel inspired and contemplative, aware of the collective quest to shape and redefine our world through knowledge.
